title: hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. cretica
intro: Hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. cretica, also known as Cretan buttonweed, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. cretica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
